name: Mocha Coffee
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Hot chocolate or cocoa mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a tightly-covered jar and store at room temperature.
To serve:
4. Measure 1-1/2 to 2 tablespoons of the coffee mix into a cup or mug.
5. Stir in boiling water to fill the cup.
6. Makes approximately 3-1/2 cups of coffee mix, serving about 25 times.
